pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic hardcoded data in setup_task.sh with 7 of 10 books from PG Top 100 (positions 4, 5, 9, 28, 41, 50, 51) and 3 books not in PG Top 100 (The Catcher in the Rye, To Kill a Mockingbird, 1984). Metadata format is custom (id, title, author, year), not authentic Project Gutenberg API format.
pi_items.source: Code inspection of setup_task.sh lines 92-105, comparison with Project Gutenberg Top 100 rankings at https://www.gutenberg.org/browse/scores/top-en.php, and Project Gutenberg API metadata specifications

pi_items.verified_value: androidx.swiperefreshlayout:swiperefreshlayout is a real, maintained Android library. Current latest version is 1.2.0 (released Feb 2025). Version 1.1.0 mentioned in task description is valid and stable.

privileged_info_summary: The task implements a Swipe-to-Refresh pattern in the BookStream Android application. The androidx.swiperefreshlayout:swiperefreshlayout dependency is a real and maintained library (latest version 1.2.0). All file paths and project structure claims are verified. However, the data source claim is contradicted: the hardcoded books.json contains 10 classic novels with 7 from Project Gutenberg's Top 100 list but 3 not in the top 100 (The Catcher in the Rye, To Kill a Mockingbird, 1984), and the metadata format is custom synthetic data, not authentic Project Gutenberg API metadata.
